description: An urgent CPSC recall has been issued for 'HP EliteBook 840 G7' laptops due to battery fire risks. Quarantine these devices by creating a status label named 'Hardware Recall' with the type 'Undeployable' and assigning it to all 'HP EliteBook 840 G7' assets. Ensure all currently deployed 'HP EliteBook 840 G7' laptops are checked in. Attach the official recall notice from '~/Documents/CPSC_Recall_Notice.pdf' to the 'HP EliteBook 840 G7' asset model. Do not modify 'HP EliteBook 840 G8' laptops.
